<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `composer docs:sync` — do not edit by hand -->

The following Blueprint column types are not yet supported:

- `binary`
- `foreignIdFor`
- `foreignUlid`
- `geography`
- `geometry`
- `morphs`
- `nullableMorphs`
- `nullableUlidMorphs`
- `nullableUuidMorphs`
- `set`
- `ulid`
- `ulidMorphs`
- `uuidMorphs`

The following Blueprint methods are skipped (indexes, foreign keys and soft deletes are not relevant to the projection):

- `cascadeOnDelete`
- `cascadeOnUpdate`
- `foreign`
- `fullText`
- `index`
- `noActionOnDelete`
- `noActionOnUpdate`
- `nullOnDelete`
- `nullOnUpdate`
- `rawIndex`
- `restrictOnDelete`
- `restrictOnUpdate`
- `softDeletes`
- `softDeletesDatetime`
- `softDeletesTz`
- `spatialIndex`
- `unique`
